mapper.select: SELECT id, eq_code, eq_name, eq_type, status, last_pm_at FROM equipment ORDER BY eq_code ASC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO equipment ( id, eq_code, eq_name, eq_type, status, last_pm_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{eqCode}, #{eqName}, #{eqType}, #{status}, #{lastPmAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE equipment SET eq_code = #{eqCode}, eq_name = #{eqName}, eq_type = #{eqType}, status = #{status}, last_pm_at = #{lastPmAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT l.id, l.equipment_id, l.log_type, l.description, l.occurred_at, l.reported_by, u.name AS reported_by_name FROM equipment_logs l LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = l.reported_by WHERE l.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO equipment_logs ( id, equipment_id, log_type, description, occurred_at, reported_by ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{equipmentId}, #{logType}, #{description}, #{occurredAt}, #{reportedBy} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, work_order_id, param_name, target_value, actual_value, unit, upper_limit, lower_limit, measured_at FROM process_params WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO process_params ( id, work_order_id, param_name, target_value, actual_value, unit, upper_limit, lower_limit, measured_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{workOrderId}, #{paramName}, #{targetValue}, #{actualValue}, #{unit}, #{upperLimit}, #{lowerLimit}, #{measuredAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE process_params SET work_order_id = #{workOrderId}, param_name = #{paramName}, target_value = #{targetValue}, actual_value = #{actualValue}, unit = #{unit}, upper_limit = #{upperLimit}, lower_limit = #{lowerLimit}, measured_at = #{measuredAt} WHERE id = #{id}
